summary: International travel cover for trips up to 365 days. Includes overseas medical, lost or delayed luggage, trip cancellation, rental-vehicle excess, and 24/7 emergency assistance hotline. Available as single-trip or annual multi-trip.
coverage: Overseas medical & hospital expenses: unlimited reasonable & necessary costs (excluding pre-existing conditions unless approved). Cancellation: up to sum insured selected ($2k-$30k) for events outside the customer's control. Luggage & personal effects: $5,000 per insured person, $1,000 single-item sub-limit, $250 excess. Travel delay: $250 per 6 hours, max $2,000. Rental-vehicle excess buy-down: up to $6,000. Personal liability: $2.5m.
exclusions: Pre-existing medical conditions unless declared and approved, undeclared high-risk activities (mountaineering above 3,000m, professional sports, motor racing), travel against DFAT 'Do Not Travel' advisories, claims directly arising from intoxication, loss of cash above $250, valuables left in unattended vehicles, items not reported to the airline carrier within 24 hours.
evidenceRequired: Travel itinerary and proof of departure/return
Property Irregularity Report (PIR) from airline for lost luggage
Medical reports & invoices for medical claims
Police report for theft of cash, passport, or valuables
